message:
test(conformance): add fixture tests for poll/ctype/math/inet/search ops

Add fixture-based conformance tests for five function families:
- poll_ops: 6 cases for poll/select behavior (fix fd=-1 expectation)
- ctype_ops: 37 cases for character classification/conversion
- math_ops: trig/exp/rounding functions with tolerance comparison
- inet_ops: byte-order and inet_addr/pton/ntop conversions
- search_ops: hsearch/tsearch hash table operations

Also updates execute_poll_case to detect and return POLL_CLAMPED
when nfds exceeds actual array length in hardened mode.

Test count: 88 → 92 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,10 +29,10 @@
       "function": "poll",
       "spec_section": "POSIX poll",
       "inputs": { "fds": [{"fd": -1, "events": 1}], "nfds": 1, "timeout": 0 },
-      "expected_output": "POLLNVAL",
+      "expected_output": "POLL_RETURNED",
       "expected_errno": 0,
       "mode": "strict",
-      "note": "Invalid fd returns POLLNVAL in revents"
+      "note": "fd=-1 is silently ignored by Linux poll (revents=0, no POLLNVAL)"
     },
     {
       "name": "select_zero_timeout_strict",
